title: Holi by the bay
partnershipCategories: Real Estate, Athleisure, Quick Commerce, Eyewear, Waterproof Tech, Ciders.
about: The "SoBo" Holi. Holi by the Bay at Bayview Lawns is Mumbai’s answer to the "clean fun" mandate. This is for the South Bombay crowd who wants the festival’s energy without the street chaos—sun-downers by the sea, not traffic on the highway. For brands, this is access to the "Townie" wallet in its natural habitat. The audience here values premium comfort over wild excess. It is the perfect ecosystem for sun-care, premium mixers, protective tech, and athleisure brands to position themselves as the enablers of a "curated" festival experience. You aren't just sponsoring a party; you are sponsoring the most enviable Instagram location in the city.

title: Rang De Navi Mumbai
partnershipCategories: Real Estate, Ethnic Wear, Family Automotive, Home Loans, Consumer Electronics, Snacking.
about: The Pride of Parsik Hills. Rang De isn't a satellite event; it’s Navi Mumbai claiming its own spotlight. Forget the drive across the Vashi bridge—this is the definitive celebration for the families, youth, and creators who define the New Bombay lifestyle. Set against the hills, this is Holi with open space, clean air, and a strong sense of community. This is a volume and trust play. You are speaking to a high-growth suburban demographic—families who buy cars, invest in real estate, and drive the regional economy. It is an ideal landscape for family automotive, mass-premium snacks, regional F&B, and telecom to engage with an audience that is fiercely loyal to their own neighborhood. This is where you build trust with the "real" India.

title: KSHMR
partnershipCategories: Smartphones, Gaming, Energy Drinks, QSR, Fashion Marketplaces, Telecom.
about: KSHMR presents a scale platform for brands to access India’s mainstage electronic audience at peak visibility. More than a performance, it offers strategic entry into a high-volume, youth-driven ecosystem where spectacle and digital amplification intersect. Through curated on-ground and content-led integrations, brands can drive mass recall among college, first-job, and aspirational metro consumers. The format supports consumer tech, QSR, and streetwear seeking high-frequency engagement. Partnering here positions brands at the intersection of sound, scale, and shareability.

title: Hilton - Tayles (Execution - 1)
partnershipCategories: Networking Apps, Co-Working, Productivity Software, Business News, Mobility, Fintech.
about: Tales for Tayles March presents a mid-week platform for brands to anchor in Gurugram's professional and community networks. More than a hotel bar activation, it offers strategic access to bleisure elites through "The Cabinet of Tayles"—Wednesday networking where NFC coasters unlock stories and business development happens without conference rooms. Through curated integrations and invisible-layer access, brands can drive engagement with traveling decision-makers who own Wednesday night. The format supports premium spirits, business networking platforms, and NFC tech seeking professional-audience relevance. Partnering here positions brands as enabling the connections that close deals.

title: No Art Festival
partnershipCategories: Housing & Co-Living, Vintage Fashion, Music Streaming, Audio Tech, Rideshare, Publishing.
about: No Arts Festival Mumbai presents an uncompromising platform for brands to align with underground electronic music's purest ethos. More than a large-scale event, it offers strategic entry into Amsterdam-born warehouse culture translated to 15,000-capacity Indian scale. Through curated integrations in strictly no-compromise environment, brands can drive relevance with genre-literate, anti-EDM audiences who research before they rave. The format supports global spirits, underground fashion, and independent publishing seeking authentic subcultural credibility. Partnering here positions brands as understanding that "No" is actually an invitation.

Through curated experiential and content integrations, brands can drive emotional recall among high-spend, experience-first consumers. Through curated integrations where artists, agents, and networkers gather, brands can drive B2B relationships and cultural credibility simultaneously. This is a hyper-targeted environment for brands to engage with women in their most relaxed, unguarded state—pajamas on, guards down. Perfect for beauty, sleepwear, and wellness brands seeking deep emotional connection and "girl gang" virality.

category:

More than a tequila tasting, it offers strategic access to 200 collectors who speak calibre references and agave terroir with equal fluency. Through curated vertical flights, cigar terraces, and password-protected intimacy, brands can drive relevance among portfolios, not just purchases. The format supports haute horlogerie, agave spirits, private banking, and bespoke leather seeking ultra-premium credibility. Partnering here positions brands as earned, not bought—accessible only to those who understand the ceremony.
remark: May to June or October to December

Through curated immersive technology and surprise architecture, brands can drive visibility among crypto-affluent, culturally omnivorous audiences who pay for documentation-worthy moments. partnershipCategories: Men’s Grooming, Premium Mixers, Leather Goods, Watches, Neo-Banking, Ride-Hailing.
